methodology_note: Math-hygiene reconciliation only. The stored 58.4 predates the v1.2 reconciliation. Substantive signals this cycle (FSF iteration, union campaign, whistleblower allegation, DoD Gemini deal) are incremental, in-progress, or unverified and warrant NO dimension movement.
